ops.text: Round 2 (2026-07-19, portal-lane): a real GUI warm-up did NOT unblock the agent — grants are per-requestor (agent requestor 'Claude Code · 8c16a88f' differs from the user's terminal), the agent's cold path still dies (ioreg SIGKILL), the daemon's auth_status RPC times out (read i/o timeout), and the yasyf-home peer daemon returns EOF mid-JSON. Self-warm, read-user's-warm, and peer-consent paths are all closed for background agents. Production workaround: bypassed cookiesync entirely — the Apple-portal task completed via the App Store Connect API with the ASC admin key. Fix targets: (1) cold-path ioreg deadline/SIGKILL in headless contexts, (2) supported grant-sharing so a GUI warm-up can authorize a named agent requestor, (3) auth_status RPC responsiveness under a flapping peer.
